Title: Establishes hate crimes against police officers
Summary: Establishes hate crimes against police officers; defines such crimes as committing murder in the first degree, aggravated murder, or murder in the second degree against a police officer and the victim is chosen because they are a police officer.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the penal law, the correction law, the criminal procedure law, and the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to establishing hate crimes against police officers
